title: Mod Collection 2
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27cc5e4090f998e203a77a0bb4fc4755f895924e.png)

**The successor to Mod Collection!**

**Recommended RAM: 4gb or more!**

Mod Collection 2 is a more techy/adventury modpack, one of its goal is to also run on lower-end PCs.

Want to make a server with this modpack? [Here you can get the server pack!](https://github.com/Command17/mc2-modpack/releases)

**Features:**
- 200+ Loaded Mods
- Seasons
- New Food
- 70+ New Biomes
- New Structures To Explore
- Overhauled End
- Tech Mods Like Create And Mekanism
- New Decorations
- Quests..? No, sorry
- End Game Item: The **Angel Ring**
- New Biomes... oh i already said that
- And uh, some more i think

<details>
